title.en: Why Things Have Colour — Absorb · Reflect · Transmit

subtitle.en: white light hits an object; the object splits the spectrum into three buckets — absorbed (becomes heat), reflected (what we see if opaque), transmitted (what we see if transparent)
subtitle.ko: 백색광이 물체에 닿으면 흡수(열)·반사(불투명 색)·투과(투명 색) 세 갈래로 갈라진다

description.en: Toggle an everyday object. Three spectral rows show absorbed/reflected/transmitted bands; perceived-colour swatch is integrated reflectance (opaque) or transmittance (transparent).
description.ko: 일상 물체 토글. 흡수/반사/투과 분광 행 3개; 인지 색은 반사(불투명) 또는 투과(투명) 적분.
